_check_except_pass
detectors.docstring: Detect except block that swallows errors with a bare pass statement.

detectors.name: _check_except_continue
detectors.docstring: Detect except block that swallows errors with a bare continue statement.

detectors.name: _check_except_ellipsis
detectors.docstring: Detect except block that swallows errors with Ellipsis (...).

detectors.name: _check_except_return_none
detectors.docstring: Detect except block returning None, hiding the exception from the caller.

detectors.name: _check_except_empty_body
detectors.docstring: Detect except block with an empty body; no error handling at all.

detectors.name: _check_except_debug_only
detectors.docstring: Detect except block that only logs at debug level; the error is not surfaced.

detectors.name: _check_except_raise_no_from
detectors.docstring: Detect except block raising a new exception without chaining (no from clause).

detectors.name: _check_except_silent_exit
detectors.docstring: Detect except block calling sys.exit(0), terminating with success on error.

detectors.name: _check_except_print
detectors.docstring:
Detect except block that only prints the error; no logging,
re-raise, or recovery.
detectors.source:
def _check_except_print(
    nxt: AddedLine,
    lines: dict[int, AddedLine],
    lineno: int,
    header_indent: int,
) -> str | None:
    """Detect except block that only prints the error; no logging,
    re-raise, or recovery."""
    match = _PRINT_RE.match(nxt.text)
    if not match:
        return None
    body_indent = len(match.group("indent"))
    if body_indent <= header_indent:
        return None
    if _is_follow_up_blocked(lines, lineno, body_indent):
        return None
    return "py-except-print"

detectors.name: _check_catch_body
detectors.docstring:
Check lines after a catch header for a silent return.

Returns "js-catch-silent-return-multi" if a silent-return violation
is found, None otherwise.

detectors.name: _check_ansible_shell_no_register
detectors.docstring:
Detect shell/command task with changed_when:false but no register
or failed_when.

detectors.name: _check_ansible_shell_no_guard
detectors.docstring:
Detect shell/command task without register, failed_when, or
changed_when guard.

detectors.name: _check_ansible_register_output_swallowed
detectors.docstring:
Detect task that registers output but only displays it on failure
(or never displays it at all).

The output is silently discarded on success. When failed_when:false is
also present, the task never fails, so conditional display-on-failure
never triggers and the output is completely invisible.
detectors.source:
def _check_ansible_register_output_swallowed(
    lines: list,
    i: int,
) -> str | None:
    """Detect task that registers output but only displays it on failure
    (or never displays it at all).

    The output is silently discarded on success. When failed_when:false is
    also present, the task never fails, so conditional display-on-failure
    never triggers and the output is completely invisible.
    """
    reg_var, _ = _find_registered_var(lines, i)
    if not reg_var or reg_var in _REG_VAR_BLOCKLIST:
        return None
    if not _has_unconditional_display(lines, i, reg_var):
        return "ansible-register-output-swallowed"
    return None
